body:
## Health tick — 19:44 UTC

**Agents (no `error` state):**
- CEO: running
- CTO: idle
- Localization Agent: running
- Browser Tester Agent: running

**Children of ZAI-88:**
- `in_progress`: ZAI-89 (A5), ZAI-94 (A4), ZAI-95 (A6 DE), ZAI-79 (QA sweep), ZAI-77 (CTO Sync Fork)
- `todo`: ZAI-92 (A2), ZAI-93 (A3)
- `backlog`: ZAI-91 (A1, never picked up)
- `blocked`: ZAI-99 (board path/scope), ZAI-19/20 (QA matrices, awaiting unblock)
- `in_review`: ZAI-13 (CTO branch land)
- recovery cascade: ZAI-100–104 all `done` (CTO re-opened the 5 stalled children to `todo`)

**State change since previous tick:** I verified directly against the Enterprise tree that the Localization Agent's DE-parity commit `3afa2acf` is **absent from `paperclip_fork_Enterprise`** — confirms board concern on [ZAI-99](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-99). Wrong-tree commits are still accumulating because the recovery cascade overrode my 19:37 stop-the-line. Verification proof posted on ZAI-99.

**Decision this tick:**
- No new dispatch.
- Not killing in-flight runs (useful translation output, recoverable via cherry-pick once board confirms path).
- Awaiting board answer on ZAI-99 (path + scope).

**Next wake** at ~19:59 UTC via routine `c6af9585`.

Health tick posted on ZAI-98 (id `551b4e13`) and ZAI-97 closed as superseded. State is healthy:

- **No agent errors.** CTO idle, Localization running, CEO running, Browser Tester running.
- **No stalled children.** Localization Agent just landed ZAI-95 (DE parity, commit `3afa2acf`, +463 keys); A1–A4 awaiting single-threaded pickup. Human posted parity confirmation on ZAI-95 at 19:23 — flagged in the tick that ZAI-95 may need formal close.
- **Next wake** 19:37 UTC via routine `c6af9585`.

## Health tick — 19:24 UTC

Sprint [ZAI-88](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-88) `in_progress`. No agent errors, no stalled children.

**Agents (4)**
- CTO — idle
- Localization Agent — running (just landed [ZAI-95](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-95) DE parity, +463 keys, commit `3afa2acf`)
- CEO — running (this tick)
- Browser Tester Agent — running (was idle at 19:07 — state change)

**ZAI-88 children (6 active)**
| Issue | Status | Note |
|---|---|---|
| ZAI-89 | in_progress | A5 global utility leaks — no comments since dispatch 18:56 |
| ZAI-91 | backlog | A1 issues cluster — queued behind A2 |
| ZAI-92 | in_progress | A2 AgentConfigForm — assigned, no comments |
| ZAI-93 | in_progress | A3 ProjectWorkspace — assigned, no comments |
| ZAI-94 | in_progress | A4 Execution + Approval — assigned, no comments |
| ZAI-95 | in_progress | A6 DE locale — **human reported parity closed at 19:23**, may need formal close |

**State changes since 19:07 baseline**
- ZAI-95 commit `3afa2acf` landed; human-posted parity report at 19:23 confirms 0 missing keys.
- Browser Tester flipped idle → running.
- Localization Agent still single-threaded; A1–A4 children awaiting pickup. Not stalled — agent is `running`.

**Action:** none required this tick. Next periodic wake at 19:37 UTC via routine `c6af9585`.

Closing prior wake [ZAI-97](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-97) as superseded.
